name: Rise of the Black Mage
description: The origin story of the Black Mage, once a light mage who sought ultimate knowledge. His descent into darkness and the corruption of the world marks the beginning of Maple World's greatest conflict.

name: Seal of Time
description: The six legendary Heroes band together to confront the Black Mage in a climactic battle. Though they succeed in sealing him away, the seal comes at a great cost, trapping the Heroes in ice for centuries.
key_characters: Aran, Evan, Mercedes, Phantom, Luminous, Shade

name: Return of the Heroes
description: Centuries after the sealing, the Heroes begin to awaken one by one as the Black Mage's seal weakens. Each Hero must recover their lost memories and powers while facing the growing threat of the Black Wings.
key_characters: Aran, Evan, Mercedes, Phantom, Luminous, Shade, Lilin

name: Rise of the Black Wings
description: The Black Wings, an organization loyal to the Black Mage, begins operating in Edelstein and across Maple World. The Resistance forms in response, fighting to liberate their city and stop the Black Mage's followers.
key_characters: Orchid, Lotus, Gelimer, Claudine, Belle, Brighton, Checky

name: Cygnus and the Empress
description: Empress Cygnus establishes the Cygnus Knights to protect Maple World from the growing darkness. As the young empress grows in power, she becomes a central figure in the fight against the Black Mage's forces.
key_characters: Cygnus, Mihile, Oz, Irena, Eckhart, Hawkeye, Shinsoo

name: Black Heaven
description: Gelimer launches his massive airship Black Heaven in a devastating assault on Maple World. The Maple Alliance unites Heroes, Cygnus Knights, and the Resistance in an epic aerial battle to stop the weapon of mass destruction.
key_characters: Gelimer, Lotus, Orchid, Cygnus, Claudine, Athena Pierce

name: Heroes of Maple
description: Damien, a half-demon commander of the Black Mage, seeks to steal the World Tree's power to destroy Maple World. The six legendary Heroes must reunite one final time to stop his plan and protect the world.
key_characters: Damien, Aran, Evan, Mercedes, Phantom, Luminous, Shade, Alicia

name: Arcane River - Vanishing Journey
description: The gateway to the Arcane River opens, revealing a mysterious realm between Maple World and the Black Mage's domain. Adventurers enter the Vanishing Journey, a land where memories and existence slowly fade away.

name: Arcane River - Chu Chu Island
description: A whimsical island in the Arcane River where everything is made of toys and sweets. Beneath the playful exterior lies a darker truth tied to the dreams and nightmares of a sleeping entity.

name: Arcane River - Lachelein
description: The City of Nightmares, Lachelein is a hauntingly beautiful dreamscape ruled by a mysterious conductor. Its inhabitants are trapped in an endless nightmare, dancing to music they cannot escape.

name: Arcane River - Arcana
description: A primordial spirit realm where nature spirits maintain the balance of life and death. The corruption of the Black Mage's influence threatens to destroy this ancient equilibrium.

name: Arcane River - Morass
description: The Swamp of Memory, where time flows differently and past events replay endlessly. Adventurers must navigate through distorted memories of Maple World's history to uncover the truth about the Black Mage's plan.

name: Arcane River - Esfera
description: The final region of the Arcane River, a shattered land at the edge of existence. Here the barrier between worlds is thinnest, and the path to the Black Mage's domain finally opens.

name: Tenebris - Moonbridge
description: A bridge of moonlight spanning the void between worlds, serving as the first passage into Tenebris. The Maple Alliance crosses this treacherous path while fending off the Black Mage's commanders.

name: Tenebris - Labyrinth of Suffering
description: A twisted labyrinth deep within Tenebris where adventurers face their deepest fears and regrets. This blockbuster storyline forces heroes to confront the emotional toll of their journey before the final battle.

name: Tenebris - Limina
description: The end of the world, where reality itself unravels at the Black Mage's throne. This is the final battlefield where the fate of all existence hangs in the balance.

name: Black Mage Final Battle
description: The ultimate confrontation with the Black Mage, the culmination of hundreds of years of conflict. The entire Maple Alliance faces the Transcendent of Light in a battle that reshapes the very fabric of the world.
key_characters: Black Mage, Adventurer, Aran, Evan, Mercedes, Phantom, Luminous, Shade

name: Cernium
description: The holy city of the Grandis continent where the sacred flame burns eternal. As the first major Grandis storyline, it introduces the conflict between the High Flora and the Alliance in a war-torn kingdom.

name: Hotel Arcus
description: A mysterious hotel that exists between dimensions, serving as a crossroads for travelers from all worlds. Its enigmatic owner holds secrets about the nature of the Grandis conflict.

name: Odium
description: An ancient dwarven city buried deep underground in Grandis, filled with advanced mechanical technology. The ruins hold clues about the Godsphere and the true history of the Ancient Gods.

name: Shangri-La
description: A paradise-like realm inspired by Eastern mythology, hidden away from the conflicts of Grandis. Its tranquil beauty conceals ancient powers and connections to the Transcendents.

name: Arteria
description: The heart of the Grandis world, a region of immense energy where the life force of the continent flows. Adventurers uncover deeper truths about the Transcendents and the fate of Grandis.

name: Carcion
description: The latest frontier in the Grandis saga, a region shrouded in mystery and danger. The conflict with the Transcendent of Life, Darmoor, intensifies as the final chapters of the Grandis story unfold.
